meta_title: For Students: debugging with AI to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: A Student's Checklist to Finish Projects
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on your projects. Learn how to use AI debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code to finish your first real-world SaaS app as a student.
content.answer_block: The 'can't finish' cycle stems from getting stuck on blockers that kill momentum. By integrating AI agents like Claude Code and Antigravity into your workflow, you transform debugging from a frustrating roadblock into a fast, iterative dialogue, allowing you to ship finished projects and build your professional engineering portfolio.
content.intro:
You’ve been there: the initial excitement of a new project fades the moment a cryptic stack trace appears. Hours bleed into days, your momentum evaporates, and the 'abandoned repo' graveyard grows by one more project. The difference between a student who dreams of building and a developer who ships isn't intelligence; it's the ability to unblock yourself instantly.

Today, we stop the cycle. By leveraging AI-first debugging, you turn your editor into a senior pair-programmer. No more staring at red text in isolation. We are going to harness Antigravity and Claude Code to systematically dismantle your blockers, keep your flow state alive, and finally cross the finish line.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Point
steps.description: Don't feed the entire repo to the AI. Identify the specific function or component throwing the error to reduce hallucination and improve context accuracy.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this specific function for logical errors. Identify why the state is not updating as expected after the API call.
steps.claude_code_command: claude read ./src/components/auth.ts --ask 'Identify the race condition here'

steps.title: Automated Trace Analysis
steps.description: Use Claude Code to parse complex logs that are too large to read manually. Focus on identifying the root cause rather than the symptoms.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Examine this stack trace. Map the error to the relevant file and suggest a refactor to prevent null pointer exceptions.

steps.title: Unit Test Generation
steps.description: Force the AI to write tests for the broken code. This forces the agent to understand the expected behavior, which often reveals the logic gap.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Jest test suite for this module that covers the edge case causing the current failure.

steps.title: Refactor for Maintainability
steps.description: Once the bug is fixed, use the AI to simplify the code. Complex, nested logic is usually where bugs hide; simplify it to make it bulletproof.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this code to follow clean code principles and improve readability. Keep the functionality identical.

steps.title: Continuous Documentation
steps.description: Document your fix immediately. This builds your portfolio and ensures you don't repeat the same mistake in your next project.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Update the README.md to include a 'Troubleshooting' section for this specific bug pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit README.md --add 'Added debugging notes for memory leak issue'

pro_tips: Treat AI as a junior developer: always verify the logic, even if the code runs perfectly.
Use 'Chain of Thought' prompting: ask the AI to explain its reasoning before it suggests a code change.
Maintain a 'Bug Journal' file in your repo; feed it to the AI to prevent recurring architectural mistakes.
Limit context windows: use .claudeignore to exclude massive data files that dilute the AI's focus.
Prioritize 'Fail Fast' logging: prompt the AI to add verbose error handling that helps you debug faster next time.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully debugged your current project, deploy it to Vercel or Netlify and document the architecture in a blog post to showcase your process to potential employers.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical leverage to stop stalling and start shipping. Don't let another project gather dust in your GitHub profile. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
